metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Golden Sweet Cherry Tomatoes add a burst of juicy, natural sweetness to salads, pastas, and roasted dishes. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, they guarantee high quality and eco-friendly standards. These vibrant tomatoes are ideal for snacking, garnishing, or bringing a golden color to your recipes. Enhance your meals with the fresh taste and bright appearance of these premium cherry tomatoes.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Golden Sweet Cherry Tomatoes, simply rinse under cold water and pat dry. Enjoy whole as a quick snack or slice in half for salads and garnishes. Roast them to intensify their sweetness, or toss into pasta for a pop of flavor and color. Use fresh to appreciate their natural sweetness and juicy texture.
metaData.SAP Product Name: ZENXIN Organic Golden Sweet Cherry Tomato
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days

product.name: ZENXIN Organic Golden Sweet Cherry Tomato

product.description: Cherry tomatoes on the vine from Holland are premium, vine-ripened fruits known for their vibrant color, rich sweetness, and firm texture. Grown under controlled greenhouse conditions, they are packed with nutrients such as vitamin C, vitamin A, potassium, fiber, and powerful antioxidants like lycopene. These nutrients contribute to stronger immunity, better vision, heart health, and healthy skin. Their natural sweetness and attractive appearance make them ideal for eating fresh, tossing into salads, roasting with herbs, or serving as an elegant garnish in gourmet dishes.

metaData.Key Information: Cherry Tomato on Vine from Netherlands is a Vibrant, sweet, and juicy tomatoes ripened naturally on the vine, perfect for salads, snacking, or garnishing.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Vegeponics Netherlands Cherry Tomato On Vine
metaData.Storage Information: Recommended to store at chilled temperature:06-10 degrees is highly perishable and should be transferred to cool storage immediately.

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Cherry Tomatoes on the Vine deliver a burst of sweetness and vibrant color, perfect for salads, roasting, and garnishing dishes. Certified organic by NASAA and processed in an ISO-certified facility, they offer top quality and sustainability. These tomatoes are delicious whether eaten raw, roasted, or grilled, enhancing any recipe with their juicy flavor. The vine-ripened freshness makes them a delightful addition to both simple and gourmet dishes.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Cherry Tomatoes on the Vine, rinse gently and pat dry. Leave on the vine for an elegant presentation, or remove and slice for salads. Roast with a drizzle of olive oil to intensify their sweetness, or grill for a smoky flavor. Serve fresh to enjoy their natural juiciness and vine-ripened taste.
metaData.SAP Product Name: ZENXIN Organic Cherry Tomato On the Vine
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days
